text:
You can export your transaction history from the Activity section in the app — look for a CSV export option there. That will give you the full record of your 2025 activity.

If you need a 1099 form, that's generated only if your account crossed the reporting threshold. Check the Documents section in the app first; if it's not there and you believe you're eligible, let us know and our ops team will follow up.

Novig Support
